description: Default CUDA profile for NVIDIA Ada-class GPUs and compatible CUDA systems.

installables.name: Git
installables.role: Clone official repositories and track installed source revisions.
installables.licenseNote: Review Git license and platform installer terms.

commands.linux: Use your distribution package manager to install git.
commands.manual: Download Git from the official source URL.

installables.name: Node.js
installables.role: Run the Codex plugin MCP server and validation scripts.
installables.licenseNote: Review Node.js license and package-manager terms.

commands.linux: Install Node.js LTS from the official NodeSource or distribution packages.
commands.manual: Download Node.js LTS from the official source URL.

installables.name: Python
installables.role: Run ComfyUI, TRELLIS2 helpers and Codex post-generation scripts.
installables.licenseNote: Review Python license and installer options.

commands.linux: Install Python 3.11 or 3.12 from the official packages for your distribution.
commands.manual: Download Python from the official source URL.

installables.name: OpenAI Codex / ChatGPT Codex
installables.role: Decision layer, plugin host and user-controlled orchestration surface.
installables.licenseNote: Review OpenAI terms, account requirements and product documentation.

commands.manual: Install Codex from the official OpenAI Codex entry point, then set CODEX_HOME if needed.

installables.validation: codex --version and Codex app plugin list

installables.name: Codex Unity ComfyUI Pipeline plugin
installables.role: Asset Factory app, MCP tools, skills, Unity templates and pipeline scripts.
installables.licenseNote: Review this plugin license plus all external tool licenses.

installables.name: ComfyUI
installables.role: Local generation engine used by Codex for image-to-3D jobs.
installables.licenseNote: Review the ComfyUI repository license and third-party node licenses.

installables.name: ComfyUI-Trellis2
installables.role: ComfyUI custom node bridge for TRELLIS2 reconstruction workflows.
installables.licenseNote: Review the ComfyUI-Trellis2 repository license and model terms.
installables.validation: ComfyUI loads the custom node without import errors.

installables.name: PyTorch CUDA
installables.role: CUDA tensor runtime for TRELLIS2, FlashAttention and xformers.
installables.licenseNote: Review PyTorch license and select the CUDA build matching the installed driver.

commands.all: python -m pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128

installables.name: CUDA / NVIDIA driver
installables.role: GPU driver and CUDA runtime support for local generation.
installables.licenseNote: Review NVIDIA CUDA toolkit and driver terms.

commands.manual: Install or update NVIDIA drivers/CUDA from the official source URL.

installables.name: FlashAttention
installables.role: Optional attention acceleration for supported CUDA builds.
installables.licenseNote: Review FlashAttention license and compatibility matrix before installing.

commands.fallback: If no compatible wheel exists, build from the official source repository or continue without FlashAttention.

installables.name: xformers
installables.role: Optional memory-efficient attention dependency for ComfyUI/TRELLIS2 workflows.
installables.licenseNote: Review xformers license and wheel compatibility with PyTorch.

commands.fallback: Build xformers from the official source repository if compatible wheels are unavailable.

installables.name: TRELLIS / TRELLIS2 models
installables.role: Official reconstruction models used by ComfyUI-Trellis2.
installables.licenseNote: Review model card, Hugging Face access rules, usage rights and commercial restrictions.

commands.all: Download with huggingface-cli after accepting the model terms.

installables.validation: Required model files exist and ComfyUI-Trellis2 can load them.

installables.name: DINOv3
installables.role: Optional/manual visual feature model required by some TRELLIS2 workflows.
installables.licenseNote: Manual download is required. Review Meta/Facebook model terms, Hugging Face access conditions and usage restrictions.
installables.manual: Open the official Hugging Face page, accept terms if required, download the model, then place it in <INSTALL_ROOT>/models/dinov3.
installables.validation: DINOv3 model file exists and checksum is recorded by the user.

installables.name: Unity Hub / Unity Editor
installables.role: Editor runtime for importing generated assets and creating prefabs/scenes.
installables.licenseNote: Review Unity terms, editor license, account requirements and target platform terms.

commands.manual: Install Unity Hub/Editor from the official source URL or point --unity-project to an existing project.

installables.validation: Unity project opens and compiles without AIAssetPipeline errors.

installables.name: MCP Unity package
installables.role: Unity-side MCP server/package for Editor operations when available.
installables.licenseNote: Detected package metadata reports MIT. Verify the upstream repository and package license before redistribution.

commands.manual: Install the validated MCP Unity package from its upstream repository or existing approved package source.

installables.name: Docker
installables.role: Optional isolated setup path for validation and CPU/bootstrap scenarios.
installables.licenseNote: Review Docker Desktop or Docker Engine license for your platform.

commands.manual: Install Docker from the official source URL.

installables.name: WSL
installables.role: Optional Linux compatibility layer on Windows.
installables.licenseNote: Review Microsoft WSL documentation and Linux distribution terms.

commands.manual: Follow the official WSL installation guide.
